title: zerna arctica
intro: Zerna arctica, also known as Arctic bellflower or Zerna, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which have been found to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, contributing to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Zerna arctica is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in herbal preparations.
